research_digest.context: Category: dentists, Merchant: Dr. Meera, Trigger: research_digest, Customer: none

output.body: Dr. Meera, JIDA's Oct issue landed. One item relevant to your high-risk adult patients — 2,100-patient trial showed 3-month fluoride recall cuts caries recurrence 38% better than 6-month. Worth a look (2-min abstract). Want me to pull it + draft a patient-ed WhatsApp you can share? — JIDA Oct 2026 p.14
output.rationale: Research digest with clinical anchor; source citation at end maintains credibility; open-ended CTA invites continuation

recall_due.context: Category: dentists, Merchant: Dr. Meera, Trigger: recall_due, Customer: Priya (lapsed_soft, hi-en mix)

output.body: Hi Priya, Dr. Meera's clinic here 👻 It's been 5 months since your last visit — your 6-month cleaning recall is due. Apke liye 2 slots ready hain: Wed 6 Nov, 6pm ya Thu 7 Nov, 5pm. ₹299 cleaning + complimentary fluoride. Reply 1 for Wed, 2 for Thu, or tell us a time that works.
output.rationale: Customer recall with language preference honored (hi-en mix); specific slots from merchant; multi-choice CTA appropriate for booking

perf_dip.context: Category: dentists, Merchant: Bharat Dental, Trigger: perf_dip (calls -50%)

output.body: Dr. Bharat, your calls dropped 50% week-over-week (4 calls vs 12 baseline). Your CTR is 0.018 — below peer median of 0.030. Quick fix: refresh your Google posts (last one 22 days ago). Want me to draft 3 posts highlighting your active offer (Dental Cleaning @ ₹299)?
output.rationale: Performance dip with specific numbers; peer comparison; actionable fix offered; binary CTA

festival_upcoming.context: Category: salons, Merchant: Studio11, Trigger: festival_upcoming (Diwali, 188 days away)

output.body: Lakshmi, Diwali is 188 days away (Oct 31) — perfect time to launch your bridal package promotion. Last year, salons in Kapra saw 2x bookings in Oct-Dec wedding season. Your Bridal Trial is already popular (Kavya booked after her trial). Want me to draft a "Diwali Special Bridal Package" post?
output.rationale: Festival trigger with specific date; local social proof; connects to existing customer (Kavya); binary CTA

ipl_match_today.context: Category: restaurants, Merchant: SK Pizza Junction, Trigger: ipl_match (DC vs MI, not weeknight)

output.body: Quick heads-up Suresh — DC vs MI at Arun Jaitley tonight, 7:30pm. Important: Saturday IPL matches usually shift -12% restaurant covers (people watch at home). Skip the match-night promo today; instead push your BOGO pizza (already active) as a delivery-only Saturday special. Want me to draft the Swiggy banner + an Insta story? Live in 10 min.
output.rationale: IPL trigger with specific match details; contrarian advice (skip promo); uses existing offer; concrete deliverables with time estimate

milestone_reached.context: Category: restaurants, Merchant: Mylari, Trigger: milestone_reached (reviews 145 → 150)

output.body: Suresh, you're about to hit 150 reviews (currently at 145)! Your 4.4⭐ rating + Weekday Thali @ ₹149 is driving strong repeat (42% repeat customer rate). Want me to draft a "Thank You" Google post + push it to your 4,200 unique YTD customers?
output.rationale: Milestone with specific numbers; references merchant's offer; uses customer aggregate data; binary CTA

customer_lapsed_hard.context: Category: gyms, Merchant: PowerHouse, Trigger: customer_lapsed_hard (Rashmi, 57 days, weight loss focus)

output.body: Hi Rashmi 👋 Karthik from PowerHouse here. It's been about 8 weeks — happens to most members at some point, no judgment. We've added a Tue/Thu evening HIIT class that fits weight-loss goals well (45 min, 6:30pm). Want me to hold a free trial spot for you next Tue, 30 Apr? Reply YES — no commitment, no auto-charge.
output.rationale: Customer winback with no-shame framing; addresses her goals; specific class details; no-commitment CTA removes barriers

supply_alert.context: Category: pharmacies, Merchant: Apollo, Trigger: supply_alert (atorvastatin recall, 22 affected customers)

output.body: Ramesh, urgent: voluntary recall on 2 atorvastatin batches (AT2024-1102, AT2024-1108) by Mfr Z — sub-potency, no safety risk, but customers should be informed for replacement. Pulled your repeat-Rx list: 22 of your chronic-Rx customers were dispensed these batches in last 90 days. Want me to draft their WhatsApp note + the replacement-pickup workflow?
output.rationale: Supply alert with specific batch numbers; uses merchant's customer aggregate (22 affected); complete workflow offer; binary CTA

chronic_refill_due.context: Category: pharmacies, Merchant: Apollo, Trigger: chronic_refill_due (Mr. Sharma, metformin/atorvastatin/telmisartan, senior)

output.body: Namaste — Apollo Health Plus Malviya Nagar yahan. Sharma ji ki 3 monthly medicines (metformin, atorvastatin, telmisartan) 28 April ko khatam hongi. Same dose, same brand pack ready hai. Senior discount 15% applied — total ₹1420 (₹240 saved). Free home delivery to saved address by 5pm tomorrow. Reply CONFIRM to dispatch, or call 9876543210 if any change in dosage.
output.rationale: Refill reminder with molecule names (precision); specific date; senior discount honored; two-channel option; binary CTA
